verses.text: Set up great stones and write the law upon them. The stones. God's word is made plain.
Set up great stones and write the law upon them. The stones. God's word is made plain.
Set up great stones and write the law upon them. The stones. God's word is made plain.
Build an altar on Ebal of unhewn stones, and rejoice. The altar. Worship accompanies the law.
Build an altar on Ebal of unhewn stones, and rejoice. The altar. Worship accompanies the law.
Build an altar on Ebal of unhewn stones, and rejoice. The altar. Worship accompanies the law.

Build an altar on Ebal of unhewn stones, and rejoice. The altar. Worship accompanies the law.
'This day thou art become the people of the LORD.' This day. The covenant is renewed.
'This day thou art become the people of the LORD.' This day. The covenant is renewed.
Six tribes on Gerizim to bless, six on Ebal to curse. Two mounts. Blessing and curse are set.
Six tribes on Gerizim to bless, six on Ebal to curse. Two mounts. Blessing and curse are set.
Six tribes on Gerizim to bless, six on Ebal to curse. Two mounts. Blessing and curse are set.
The Levites pronounce the curses, and all the people say, Amen. Cursed. The law's penalty is owned by all.
